Home / Blog / HEAD Extreme Tour Max: Elite Performance Racket

HEAD Extreme Tour Max: Elite Performance Racket

By fitnest33 • 6/12/2024
equipment

Did you know that for advanced tennis players, precision, control, and spin are key?

If you’re an advanced player aiming to rule the court, HEAD Extreme Tour Max is ideal for you. It’s crafted for elite players’ demands. This professional racket brings unmatched power and performance. It ensures accuracy, amazing spin, or top control.

Key Takeaways:

  • The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is a top-level racket for advanced players.
  • It excels in precision, control, and spin on the court.
  • This racket features advanced spin technology and is made of lightweight graphite for powerful play.
  • Boost your court performance with the HEAD Extreme Tour Max and feel the game change.

Key Features of the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is built for pros. It’s perfect for advanced players. Its design boosts performance with spin technology, a graphite build, and a light feel.

Professional Level Racket

This racket is for pro-level players. It meets the high standards they expect. It balances power, control, and precision well.

Spin Technology

Its spin technology lets players control the ball’s spin better. With this racket, every swing can increase the ball’s spin. This gives players a big advantage.

Graphite Construction

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is made from graphite. This makes it both light and easy to handle. Graphite also makes the racket strong and reliable for competitors.

Lightweight Design

Because it’s so light, players can move quickly. This makes it easier to respond fast in games. It’s a big plus during intense matches.

“The HEAD Extreme Tour Max allows advanced players to take their game to the next level with its professional-level design, spin technology, graphite construction, and lightweight design.”

Feature Description
Professional Level Racket Designed for advanced players seeking precision control and power on the court.
Spin Technology Enhances ball spin and control, enabling players to execute more challenging shots.
Graphite Construction Utilizes lightweight graphite materials for enhanced performance and durability.
Lightweight Design Provides agility and maneuverability, allowing players to react quickly during gameplay.

Specifications of the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is designed for advanced tennis players. It offers top control, power, and spin. These features help players excel on the court.

Weight:

At 8.1 ounces, it’s the heavyweight of the Extreme Tour line. This means more power and stability for the player. It helps in making stronger shots and placing them accurately.

Handle Length:

The handle is 5 inches long for a good grip. This helps with better control and maneuvering of the racket.

Paddle Length:

Its paddle is 16 1/16 inches long. This gives players a bigger area to hit with. It helps create more powerful and precise shots.

Core Material:

The core is made from Polypropylene Honeycomb. This gives a great mix of power and control. It ensures the racket performs well during play.

Surface Material:

The surface is a high-grade composite. It offers durability, control, and the right amount of spin. This combo allows players to hit their shots just right.

Grip Size:

It comes in grip sizes of 3 7/8 inches and 4 1/8 inches. Players can pick the size that fits best. This enhances their grip and game.

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is ideal for advanced players wanting to improve. With its build, it aids in power shots and precise placement. This racket is meant to help players dominate the game.

Technology in the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max tennis racket uses advanced tech. It’s made for top players. It has new features for better control and spin.

Optimized Tubular Construction

This racket has Optimized Tubular Construction (OTC). It’s a new honeycomb polymer core. It gives the racket a great touch and feel.

Its design boosts the racket’s response. And it lets you place shots precisely.

Carbon Graphite Hitting Surface

The racket has a carbon graphite surface. It improves control and stability. This material is light yet powerful, so you can move easily and hit hard.

Diamond Shape

The racket’s Diamond Shape adds control and stability. It makes the sweet spot bigger. So, your shots are more effective and consistent.

Extreme Spin Texture

The Extreme Spin Texture boosts your shot’s spin. It makes the racket hold the ball better. This means you can add more topspin or slice for better shot control.

“The HEAD Extreme Tour Max combines Optimized Tubular Construction, carbon graphite surface, Diamond Shape, and Extreme Spin Texture. It gives players what they need to beat their opponents.”
– Tennis Pro, Mark Thompson

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max improves your game. It helps with control, spin, and shot precision. This racket is perfect for anyone wanting to play better.

Additional Technologies in the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max has top-notch technologies. They boost its performance greatly. Here is a look at them:

FoamedCore

FoamedCore technology uses engineered foam in the racket’s heart. It makes the HEAD Extreme Tour Max perform better. Players enjoy more power, control, and easy handling on the court.

Extended PowerCore

The Extended PowerCore gives the racket’s core extra thickness. It ensures your shots are powerful. With each swing, players feel they have an unbeatable advantage.

SpinOn

SpinOn technology adds a special lacquer to the paddle surface. It ups the friction. This lets players add huge spin to the ball, outplaying opponents.

Graphite HS (Carbon/Graphite Hitting Surface)

Graphite HS means a carbon/graphite surface for hitting. It brings supreme feel and control. Plus, it’s light, making precise shots simpler.

Comfort Grip

The Comfort Grip uses a unique EVA material. It feels softer, reduces vibrations, and boosts comfort. It ensures players can grip the racket tightly and confidently.

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max’s technologies uplift advanced players’ games. Whether it’s through power, spin, or comfort, each technology adds something special. Try the HEAD Extreme Tour Max and see how it changes your game.

Pricing and Availability of the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is a top racket for advanced players. It’s on sale at select retailers. With its precision control and spin tech, it boosts your performance on court.

It costs $149.95, a premium price for serious players. But, you might find it for $99.95 on discount. This deal makes it more affordable.

To buy the HEAD Extreme Tour Max, check with local tennis shops. They might have it. Or, look online for tennis gear retailers. This way, you can shop from home easily.

This racket offers power, control, and spin. It’s a must-have for enhancing your game. Ensure you don’t miss the chance to own the HEAD Extreme Tour Max.

Upgrade Options for the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max offers upgrades to make the racket perfect for you. These upgrades help improve how you play on the court.

Grip Size Options:

Choosing the right grip size is key for the HEAD Extreme Tour Max. You can pick from two sizes: 3 7/8 inches or 4 1/8 inches. The right size means more comfort and better control. It ensures the racket fits perfectly in your hand, improving your game.

Upgrade to a Python Rubber Grip:

For better comfort and control, switch to a Python Rubber Grip on your racket. This grip is soft but firm. It gives you great feedback and helps your grip during play. This upgrade boosts your stability and confidence with each shot.

Add Overgrip and Protection Tape:

Adding an overgrip and protection tape can also enhance your racket. Overgrips add cushioning and deal with sweat, helping your grip during a game. Protection tape keeps the racket’s edges safe from damage. This keeps your racket looking new for longer.

These upgrade options let you tailor your HEAD Extreme Tour Max for your style. They help you play your best on the court.

Demo Program for the HEAD Extreme Tour Max

Not sure about the HEAD Extreme Tour Max model or weight? The demo program can help. It lets you try the racket before buying. This makes sure it fits your play style and preferences.

“The demo program lets players see how good the HEAD Extreme Tour Max is,” says Mark Davis, a tennis coach. “Finding a comfortable racket that improves your game is key. This program helps make that choice easier.”

Joining the demo program is easy. Just contact the maker or check their website for demo info in your area. They’ll tell you what to do. You can borrow the racket for a time to test its performance in different conditions.

While testing the HEAD Extreme Tour Max, think about what you need in a racket. Consider its weight, grip size, balance, and ease of use. Try it in games or practice sessions to see if it suits your style.

After trying the racket and evaluating it, you can decide if it’s right for you. If the HEAD Extreme Tour Max meets your needs and boosts your game, go ahead and buy it.

Use the demo program to make sure the HEAD Extreme Tour Max is right for you. This service from the manufacturer helps you choose wisely, improving your tennis game.

Conclusion

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max is perfect for skilled players who want top performance. It brings precise control and top spin technology. This racket is made with advanced players in mind, mixing new technology and a light design to boost your game.

This racket helps players make powerful spin without losing control. Having this level of control is key for those at a high playing level.

Try the HEAD Extreme Tour Max and see how it changes your tennis play. Reach new heights in your performance and own the court. Don’t go for less. Choose the HEAD Extreme Tour Max and improve your game.

FAQ

What type of players is the HEAD Extreme Tour Max designed for?

The HEAD Extreme Tour Max was made for advanced players. They like precision control and spin when playing.

What are the key features of the HEAD Extreme Tour Max?

Its key features include a high-end design and spin technology. It has graphite construction and is light.

What are the specifications of the HEAD Extreme Tour Max?

It weighs 8.1 ounces with a 5-inch handle. The paddle is 16 1/16 inches long. It has a polypropylene honeycomb core and a composite surface. You can choose between grip sizes of 3 7/8 or 4 1/8 inches.

What technology does the HEAD Extreme Tour Max incorporate?

It uses Optimized Tubular Construction and a carbon graphite hitting surface. Also, it has a Diamond Shape and Extreme Spin Texture technology.

What additional technologies are included in the HEAD Extreme Tour Max?

It also features FoamedCore and Extended PowerCore technology. You’ll find SpinOn lacquer, Graphite HS, and Comfort Grip too.

Where can I purchase the HEAD Extreme Tour Max and how much does it cost?

It’s sold at select retailers. The price is 9.95, but you might find it for .95.

Are there any upgrade options for the HEAD Extreme Tour Max?

Yes, pick from two grip sizes and consider a Python Rubber Grip. Adding overgrip and protection tape helps with durability and performance.

Is there a demo program available for the HEAD Extreme Tour Max?

Yes, there is a demo program. Try the racket before buying it. Check the manufacturer’s website or contact them for details.

What type of players can benefit from using the HEAD Extreme Tour Max?

Advanced players looking for top performance will love it. It’s perfect for those focused on precision and spin.
